Secure & Private

Privacy Policy

We are committed to protecting your digital legacy with industry-leading security protocols and absolute transparency.

Project Vision & Objectives

Our mission is to help individuals preserve their life stories and articulate their final wishes in a guided and personal manner. This platform seeks to address the emotional uncertainty often faced by families by providing:

  • User-friendly, accessible, and secure record-keeping
  • Meaningful and organized storytelling formats
  • Heartfelt legacy messaging for loved ones
  • Organized archive across 15+ life categories
  • A lasting digital keepsake of deep emotional value
  • Foster thoughtful conversations around legacy

Data Encryption & Security

All user data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. Sensitive information such as living wills, medical preferences, and personal messages is securely stored using industry-standard encryption protocols (Salt integration & AES-256).

Secure Cloud Infrastructure

The platform is deployed on world-class cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure). We utilize Amazon EC2 for secure computing, S3 for encrypted media storage (via secure pre-signed URLs), and RDS for robust relational database management. This ensures high availability (99.9% uptime), scalability, and security.

Structured Content Modules

We provide structured categories for organizing your digital legacy: About Me, My Life, Work Life, My Spouse, Children, Friends, Pets, Favorites, Spiritual Beliefs, Family Tree, Passing Away, Living Will, DNR, Journals, Letters to Loved Ones, Pictures, Audio, and Videos.

Access Control & Legacy Contacts

Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) ensures designated family members have secure access only to specific parts of the platform. You can assign 'Legacy Contacts' who can access your content after your passing via multi-factor authentication for the nominated members.

AI-Powered Privacy & Tagging

Using AI-driven recommendations, the application guides users through documenting memories while ensuring they maintain control. Content can be tagged with themes and set to Public, Private, or Shared visibility to maintain the utmost privacy and care.

Continuous Security Monitoring

We utilize automated CI/CD pipelines (via GitHub Actions) for continuous security testing and deployment. Our Express.js backend provides robust business logic, role-based access control, and secure file upload endpoints returning signed S3 URLs.

If

A structured yet compassionate space for individuals to preserve memories, communicate values, and thoughtfully express final wishes.
